summary: Full e2e testing of 17Katas landing page. All backend API tests pass (7/7). UI renders correctly with all required sections. Form submissions (brand + distributor) work end-to-end with success messages. Validation on empty form works.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend accepts any string for email field - no email format validation on server side (minor, frontend handles it via type=email)
No rate limiting or duplicate submission prevention on waitlist endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created 2 waitlist entries (TEST_Brand and TEST_Dist) via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: Navbar (17KATAS logo, tagline, Join Beta btn), Hero (CONTENT THAT PAYS headline, two CTAs), Ticker, Stats (₹50+, 0 Days, 100%), How It Works (steps), Why 17Katas cards, Dual waitlist forms (brand + distributor with validation + API integration), Manifesto quote, Footer. Backend APIs /api/waitlist/brand and /api/waitlist/distributor both working.
